managedblockchain.node.MemberId.Description: The unique identifier of the member to which the node belongs. Applies only to Hyperledger Fabric.

managedblockchain.node.NetworkId.Description: The unique identifier of the network for the node.  Ethereum public networks have the following `NetworkId`s:  +  `n-ethereum-mainnet` +  `n-ethereum-rinkeby` +  `n-ethereum-ropsten`

managedblockchain.node.NodeConfiguration.Description: Configuration properties of a peer node.
